holdings.infoBox: RNIN is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Oscar Health stock at 2.66%, TD SYNNEX at 1.94%, MannKind at 1.90%, TG Therapeutics at 1.88%, and Crocs at 1.79%.

overview.description: The Bushido Capital US SMID Cap Equity ETF (RNIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that aims for long-term capital appreciation by investing in US-listed small- and mid-cap companies. The fund selects 100 stocks through a fundamental value approach using both quantitative and qualitative analyses. RNIN was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Bushido.
